description: A model rocket at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork has inefficient rectangular fins (root chord = 150mm, tip chord = 150mm, sweep length = 0mm). Redesign the fin set to a more aerodynamically efficient swept and tapered planform where the tip chord is smaller than the root chord and the sweep length is greater than 0mm. Ensure the rocket remains stable with a stability margin above 1.0 caliber and verify the design with a flight simulation. Save the modified rocket design and write a multi-paragraph analysis report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_redesign_report.txt documenting the original and new fin dimensions, stability margin assessment, and simulated performance changes.
